basics.name: Himanshu Rav
basics.headline: Mobile Software Engineer
basics.tagline: Flutter, cross-platform systems, offline-first architecture, analytics, native SDK integration
basics.summary: Mobile engineer with 5+ years of experience in Flutter and cross-platform development, with strong depth in analytics, feature flags, session tracking, crash monitoring, offline-first synchronization, and native Android/iOS bridges. Experienced in SDK-focused work, production debugging, and building performant mobile systems for remote teams.

about: At GoAudits, I build reliable mobile experiences powered by Flutter, analytics, feature flags, crash reporting, and offline-first synchronization. My work focuses on performance, correctness, and developer ergonomics so products stay stable as they scale.

With a B.Tech background in Computer Science and experience across Flutter, native integrations, SDK workflows, and backend-connected mobile systems, I enjoy turning complex product requirements into intuitive user experiences and maintainable engineering foundations.

highlights: Built offline-first data synchronization with Realm App Sync and MongoDB.
Integrated analytics, feature flags, and crash or exception tracking.
Optimized runtime behaviour for large dynamic forms and complex flows.
Collaborated across product and engineering to improve scalability.
Worked on B2B apps with heavy API usage and analytics instrumentation.
Improved runtime and rendering performance by about 25 percent.
Delivered features in remote team workflows with fast iteration cycles.
Implemented real-time updates, analytics integrations, and feature toggles.
Created reusable UI components and improved app responsiveness.
Supported feature-heavy product delivery under contract timelines.
Built analytics dashboards and real-time progress tracking flows.
Delivered role-based UX systems across education-focused products.
Partnered with teams to improve usability and product clarity.
Developed enterprise mobile apps with real-time notifications and analytics.
Maintained a 99 percent crash-free user experience.
Contributed to stable releases across production environments.

projects.title: Offline Audit Platform
projects.summary: Designed mobile experiences for field auditing workflows with offline sync, feature flags, crash monitoring, and dynamic forms that scale to complex enterprise use cases.

projects.title: B2B Performance Modernization
projects.summary: Improved rendering throughput and API-heavy experience quality for business applications, resulting in a measurable performance uplift and smoother navigation across data-rich screens.

projects.title: Real-Time Learning Dashboard
projects.summary: Built progress tracking, analytics views, and role-aware experiences for education products with live updates and user-focused interaction design.

education.institution: Shri Bhawani Niketan Institute of Technology & Management
Arya College of Engineering and IT
education.degree: Bachelor of Technology, Electrical and Electronics Engineering

recommendations.name: Deepanshu Rawat
recommendations.quote: I’ve had the pleasure of knowing and working with Himanshu since our college days. Later we worked together at TestnTrack GoAudits, where he demonstrated exceptional skills in Python, machine learning, and OpenCV. Over the past four years, Himanshu has established himself as a skilled Flutter developer, building intuitive and high-performance mobile applications.

recommendations.name: Dipendra Singh Rathore
recommendations.quote: Working with Himanshu was a fantastic experience. He is professional, deeply experienced in business solutions, and able to understand complex issues outside his immediate area of expertise. He combines strong interpersonal skills with reliability and forward-thinking senior developer energy.
